title: Luminous graph (v3)
description: The model file. Co-located with a `<pack>.pack.json` resolved via the `pack` field. Mirrors what packages/core/src/validate.ts enforces on the graph side.

pack.description: Basename of the sibling `.pack.json` (resolved in the same directory). Use "primitives" to skip pack authoring.

defaultView.description: Must match a `views[].id` in the resolved pack.

id.description: Stable, derived from source content. NEVER a random UUID -- random ids defeat diffable pipeline re-runs.

kind.description: Must match a `nodeKinds[].id` in the resolved pack.

props.description: Validated against the matching nodeKind's `props` JSON Schema. Specific prop names may have engine-side effects: `tier` (integer >= 0) is read as a soft ELK layering hint when the view uses `layout.algorithm: "elk"`.

tags.description: Free-form string array; may be empty.

id.description: Stable. Canonical form: `edge.<edgeKind>.<fromId>.<toId>` (add a disambiguator suffix for parallel edges).

from.description: id of the source node. The server rejects edges to unknown nodes at add-time.
